_layout_notes: Reliance ships a 9-sheet workbook: 4 rate sheets (April CV26 / April-Short Term PCV Taxi / April TW26 / April PVT COM) + 5 reference / contest / master sheets.

Ignored for now: 'Enabler & Volume Slab' and 'Winter Bonanza' (volume contests, separate task), plus 'PVT car Group' / 'PVT car Segment' / 'Obsolete Models Declined' (master tables — kept on disk only, used at calc time later).

All four rate sheets share a common skeleton: Zone (col 1) + RTO Region cluster (col 2) + RTO Region city (col 3) + paired COMP/STP rate columns. April CV26 has the most columns (~50) covering PCV 3W, School Bus, PCV Taxi (multiple variants), GCV 2.5K-50K+, GCV 3W, Car Carrier, Flat Bed, MISD-CPM, Tractor, Employee Pickup.
